channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Coby White scores 31 points as Bulls rally to beat Nets 116-110
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Coby White scored 31 points, and the Chicago Bulls beat the Brooklyn Nets 116-110 on Thursday night. White extended his streak of 20-point games to a career-best seven, helping the Bulls rally to win their season-high fourth in a row.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Not just Ohtani: Tokyo Series will showcase the depth of Japanese talent in Major League Baseball
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — The spotlight will be on slugger Shohei Ohtani this week when the superstar returns to Japan and leads the defending World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers against the Chicago Cubs in the first two games of the Major League Baseball season at the Tokyo Dome.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lakers' James, Hachimura, Hayes fly back to California for treatment and will miss rest of road trip
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — LeBron James flew back to California for treatment on his left groin strain and will miss the rest of the Los Angeles Lakers’ four-game trip, which concludes Friday at Denver.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Camilo Villegas and Lucas Glover among those sharing Players Championship lead on wild day
item.description: PONTE VEDRA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Camilo Villegas was on the phone the day before The Players Championship trying to sort out his swing with a coach who is in Singapore caddying at a LIV Golf event. He wound up tied for the lead, a peculiar twist in a tournament filled with them.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Southwest Airlines takes aim at Mavericks, Luka Doncic as carrier navigates turbulence over baggage fee policy
item.description: The airline continues to contend with backlash after revealing plans to apply a checked bag fee. But the carrier briefly deflected the fallout to the Mavericks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tiger Woods, Vanessa Trump have been dating since last year: report
item.description: Tiger Woods and President Donald Trump's former daughter-in-law, Vanessa, have been dating since Thanksgiving, according to a recent report.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego FC announces measures to discourage fans from engaging in homophobic chant
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — San Diego FC will use pre-match and in-stadium messaging, enhanced security measures and strong enforcement of policies to discourage fans from engaging in what it called “discriminatory chants” at home matches, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cougars make 18 three-pointers in 96-92 victory
item.description: KANSAS CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 23 points, hitting a crucial 3-pointer with less than a minute to go, and No. 17 BYU overcame a big game from Curtis Jones in a 96-90 victory over No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hanna Cavinder wipes Carson Beck off Instagram as breakup rumors swirl
item.description: Hanna Cavinder scrubbed Carson Beck off her Instagram account amid rumors that the two Miami athletes have broken up due to possible infidelity.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The growth of women's sports is spurring a building boom
item.description: While it might not be the flashiest way to chart the rapid growth of women's professional sports, a building boom is showing that investors are paying attention. There's already a dedicated women's soccer stadium in the National Women's Soccer League and another one is planned.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Duke beats Georgia Tech 78-70 after losing Flagg, Brown to injuries in ACC quarterfinals
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Kon Knueppel scored 28 points as No. 1 Duke overcame injuries to star Cooper Flagg and Maliq Brown to beat Georgia Tech 78-70 on Thursday and advance to the ACC Tournament semifinals.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Commanders, Bears, Patriots among the biggest winners in NFL free agency so far
item.description: The NFL’s new year officially kicked off Wednesday, two days after teams began spending big money in free agency.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mason Rudolph is reuniting with Pittsburgh Steelers on a 2-year deal, AP source says
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Mason Rudolph is back to where he once belonged. The veteran quarterback has reached an agreement to return to the Pittsburgh Steelers on a two-year deal, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah moves closer to playoff berth with 3-2 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After blowing leads in their two previous meetings with the Anaheim Ducks this season, the Utah Hockey Club wasn't about to let it happen a third time.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Lacrosse: La Jolla Country Day 17, Rancho Bernardo 4
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Boys Lacrosse in the north county on Tuesday evening with La Jolla Country Day beating Rancho Bernardo 17-4.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Volleyball: Del Norte 3, Rancho Bernardo 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Boys Volleyball at Rancho Bernardo with the Broncos falling in three against Del Norte.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Lacrosse: Carlsbad 11, Granite Hills 7
item.description: EL CAJON (KUSI)- Boys Lacrosse action on Monday night in El Cajon with Granite Hills hosting Carlsbad. The Lancers win a very good game 11-7. Despite Carson Kowalsky, just a junior having a great game, scoring four goals for Granite Hills.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Dad leads team to state tourney after coach's death
item.description: "I really think that we've helped him through that and he's helped us through this," said Rachel Cordell.
item.dc:creator: Adria Goins/KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Southwestern League basketball All-Conference teams announced
item.description: It was a wild season filled with buzzer-beaters and many other incredible moments, as we congratulate the great players honored on this year's Southwestern League All-Conference Teams.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jets and QB Justin Fields agree to a 2-year, $40 million deal, AP source says
item.description: Justin Fields was passed over by the New York Jets four years ago in the NFL draft. Now he's expected to be their No. 1 quarterback. Fields and the Jets agreed Monday to a two-year contract worth $40 million, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bills reward Allen with new contract after NFL MVP season. Deal is worth $330M, AP source says
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — NFL MVP Josh Allen was rewarded Sunday with a contract extension worth $330 million, including an NFL record $250 million of it guaranteed, which makes him among the league’s highest-paid players.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Soccer CIF Division IV SoCal State Regional Championship: Pacific Ridge 3, Central Union 2
item.description: The CIF Division IV Boys Soccer SoCal Regional State Championship featured two San Diego Section teams, as the Pacific Ridge Firebirds hosted the Central Union Spartans.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: BYU pulls away from Utah for 8th straight win, 85-74
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team is rolling into the postseason. Dawson Baker scored 15 points and Richie Saunders added 14 to lead No. 23 BYU to an 85-74 victory over rival Utah on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah Valley clinches WAC regular season title
item.description: STEPHENVILLE, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Dominick Nelson matched a career high with 25 points, and Carter Welling added 18 as Utah Valley defeated Tarleton State 71-66 in a sold-out Wisdom Gym on Saturday night, closing out WAC play with a statement win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake aims to keep winning as San Diego FC visits for the first time
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns to action at America First Field on Saturday night, facing MLS expansion side San Diego FC for the first time. Coming off a commanding 2-0 win over Seattle last weekend, RSL looks to build momentum and keep their shutout streak alive in front of their raucous home crowd.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Nikola Jokic makes NBA history with 30-20-20 triple-double in Nuggets' OT win over Suns
item.description: The three-time NBA MVP had the league's first 30-20-20 triple-double in the Denver Nuggets' 149-141 overtime victory over the Phoenix Suns on Friday night. Jokic had 31 points, 21 rebounds and a career-high 22 assists.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KELLY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kessler pulls down 25 rebounds in Jazz loss at Toronto
item.description: TORONTO (ABC4 Sports) - Walker Kessler set a career high with 25 rebounds, to go along with a team-high 18 points and a career-high eight blocks, but it wasn't enough to prevent another loss by the Utah Jazz, who fell at Toronto Friday night, 118-101.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah's comeback falls short in 4-3 overtime loss
item.description: CHICAGO (ABC4 Sports) - Connor Bedard scored at 3:10 of overtime to give the Chicago Blackhawks a 4-3 victory against the Utah Hockey Club at United Center on Friday. Bedard circled the net and scored from the slot after going eight games without a goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Connor Bedard scores in overtime to lift Blackhawks to 4-3 win over Utah
item.description: Connor Bedard scored 3:10 into overtime to give the Chicago Blackhawks a 4-3 victory over the Utah Hockey Club on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: A's announce 3-year Las Vegas sponsorship as club looks toward future move
item.description: The Athletics will play in Northern California for at least the next three seasons, but will also represent their future home in Las Vegas and brought four of their star players to drive home that point.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5
